function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.amezit_cred_decrypt(cipher bytea)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select pgp_sym_decrypt($1, current_setting('amezit.cred_key', true));
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.amezit_cred_encrypt(plain text)
 RETURNS bytea
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select pgp_sym_encrypt($1, current_setting('amezit.cred_key', true), 'compress-algo=1');
$function$

arguments: p_user_id uuid, p_auth_key text, p_auth_value integer
p_object_key text, p_object_id text, p_group_id integer
p_user_id uuid, p_group_id integer, p_group_role text

function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.check_user_is_in_group(p_group_id integer, p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select exists (
    select 1
    from public.user_group_assignment uga
    where uga.group_id = p_group_id
      and uga.user_id = p_user_id
  );
$function$

p_group_name text, p_obj_group boolean, p_parent_group integer, p_object_key text

arguments: p_project_id bigint, p_user_id uuid, p_max_entrys integer, p_up_to_date timestamp with time zone
function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_chat(p_project_id bigint, p_user_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_max_entrys integer DEFAULT 20, p_up_to_date timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now())
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$with base as (
  select
    pc.id,
    pc.project_id,
    pc.created_at,
    pc."user_id",
    pc.response_to_user,
    pc.message
  from public.project_chatlog pc
  where
    pc.project_id = p_project_id
    and pc.created_at < coalesce(p_up_to_date, now())
    and (
      p_user_id is null
      or (
        pc."user_id" = p_user_id
        or (
          pc."user_id" = '484d7db2-17da-4769-bc3a-23b3a2d54ad2'::uuid
          and pc.response_to_user = p_user_id
        )
      )
    )
),
ranked as (
  select
    b.*,
    row_number() over (order by b.created_at desc, b.id desc) as rn
  from base b
),
chosen as (
  select *
  from ranked
  where
    coalesce(p_max_entrys, 20) = 0
    or rn <= coalesce(p_max_entrys, 20)
),
final_rows as (
  select
    id,
    project_id,
    created_at,
    case
      when "user_id" = '484d7db2-17da-4769-bc3a-23b3a2d54ad2'::uuid then '__assistant__'
      else "user_id"::text
    end as "user_id",
    response_to_user,
    message
  from chosen
  order by created_at asc, id asc
)
select coalesce(jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(final_rows)), '[]'::jsonb)
from final_rows;$function$

return_type: TABLE(user_id uuid, company_id bigint, pplan_id integer)
TABLE(group_id integer, service text, ext_user_name text, pw text)
function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_group_cred(p_group_id integer, p_service text)
 RETURNS TABLE(group_id integer, service text, ext_user_name text, pw text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$select
    gc.group_id,
    gc.service,
    case when gc.ext_user_name_enc is null then null
         else public.amezit_cred_decrypt(gc.ext_user_name_enc)
    end as ext_user_name,
    public.amezit_cred_decrypt(gc.pw_enc) as pw
  from public.group_cred gc
  where gc.group_id = p_group_id
    and gc.service = p_service$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_group_members(p_group_id integer)
 RETURNS SETOF uuid
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
  select uga.user_id
  from public.user_group_assignment uga
  where uga.group_id = p_group_id
$function$

return_type: TABLE(pplan_id integer, auth_key text, auth_value integer, auth_class text, is_auth_class boolean, auth_description text, assigned_at timestamp with time zone)

function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_project_overview(p_company_id integer, p_user_id text DEFAULT ''::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$declare
  v_result jsonb;
begin
  select coalesce(jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(t)), '[]'::jsonb)
    into v_result
  from (
    select *
    from public.project_information pi
    where
      (p_company_id = 1)
      or (
        pi.company_id = p_company_id
        and (
          nullif(btrim(p_user_id), '') is null
          or pi.user_id_auth = p_user_id
        )
      )
    order by pi.created_at desc
  ) as t;

  return v_result;
end;$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_project_parameters_json(p_project_id bigint, p_env_id smallint DEFAULT NULL::smallint)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
with cust as (
  select
    cpp.param_group,
    cpp.param_key,
    cpp.param_is_iterable,
    cpp.env_id
  from public.cust_project_params cpp
  where p_env_id is null or cpp.env_id = p_env_id
),
joined as (
  select
    c.param_group,
    c.param_key,
    c.param_is_iterable,
    coalesce(
      jsonb_agg(pp.parameter_value order by pp.id)
        filter (where pp.parameter_value is not null and btrim(pp.parameter_value) <> ''),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ) as values,
    bool_or(pp.parameter_value is not null and btrim(pp.parameter_value) <> '') as is_filled
  from cust c
  left join public.project_params pp
    on  pp.project_id = p_project_id
    and pp.parameter_group = c.param_group
    and pp.parameter_name  = c.param_key
  group by
    c.param_group, c.param_key, c.param_is_iterable
),
all_params as (
  select
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'parameter_group', param_group,
        'parameter_name',  param_key,
        'is_iterable',     param_is_iterable,
        'values',          values
      )
      order by param_group, param_key
    ) as parameters,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'parameter_group', param_group,
        'parameter_name',  param_key,
        'is_iterable',     param_is_iterable
      )
      order by param_group, param_key
    ) filter (where coalesce(is_filled, false) = false) as open_parameters
  from joined
)
select jsonb_build_object(
  'parameters',      coalesce(parameters, '[]'::jsonb),
  'openParameters',  coalesce(open_parameters, '[]'::jsonb)
)
from all_params;
$function$

arguments: p_period_key text, p_ref_ts timestamp with time zone

return_type: TABLE(service text, ext_user_name text, pw text)
function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_cred(p_service text)
 RETURNS TABLE(service text, ext_user_name text, pw text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select
    uc.service,
    public.amezit_cred_decrypt(uc.ext_user_name_enc) as ext_user_name,
    public.amezit_cred_decrypt(uc.pw_enc) as pw
  from public.user_cred uc
  where uc.service = p_service
    and uc.user_id = auth.uid()
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.getprojectmodel(p_project_id bigint)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'pg_temp'
AS $function$declare
  result jsonb;
begin
  select jsonb_build_object(
    'project_id', pi.project_id,
    'project_title', pi.project_title,
    'created_at', pi.created_at,
    'owner', jsonb_build_object(
      'user_id', pi.user_id,
      'user_id_auth', pi.user_id_auth,
      'profile', (
        select to_jsonb(pr.*)
        from public.profiles pr
        where pr.user_id_auth = pi.user_id_auth
        limit 1
      )
    ),
    'chatMessages', coalesce(
      (select jsonb_agg(
         jsonb_build_object(
           'id', pcl.id,
           'created_at', pcl.created_at,
           'user_text', pcl.user_text,
           'ai_response', pcl.ai_response
         ) order by pcl.created_at
       )
       from public."projectChatLog" pcl
       where pcl.project_id = pi.project_id),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    'projectParameters', coalesce(
      (select jsonb_agg(
         jsonb_build_object(
           'id', pp.id,
           'created_at', pp.created_at,
           'parameter_group', pp.parameter_group,
           'parameter_name', pp.parameter_name,
           'parameter_value', pp.parameter_value
         ) order by pp.created_at
       )
       from public.project_params pp
       where pp.project_id = pi.project_id),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    'customParameterDefinitions', coalesce(
      (select jsonb_agg(
         jsonb_build_object(
           'param_key', cpp.param_key,
           'param_group', cpp.param_group,
           'param_is_iterable', cpp.param_is_iterable
         )
       )
       from public.cust_project_params cpp),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    'projectFiles', coalesce(
      (select jsonb_agg(
         jsonb_build_object(
            'id', pf.id,
            'file_path', pf.file_path,
            'content', pf.content,
            'user_id', pf.user_id
         )
       )
       from public.project_files pf
       where pf.project_id = pi.project_id),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    'changelog', coalesce(
      (select jsonb_agg(
         jsonb_build_object(
            'id', cl.id,
            'title', cl.title,
            'description', cl.description,
            'created_at', cl.created_at
         ) order by cl.created_at desc
       )
       from public.changelog cl
       where cl.project_id = pi.project_id),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    'userFeedback', coalesce(
      (select jsonb_agg(
         jsonb_build_object(
            'id', uf.id,
            'user_id', uf.user_id,
            'feedback_text', uf.feedback_text,
            'created_at', uf.created_at
         ) order by uf.created_at desc
       )
       from public.user_feedback uf
       where uf.user_id = pi.user_id),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    'templates', coalesce(
      (select jsonb_agg(
         jsonb_build_object(
            'id', t.id,
            'file_name', t.file_name,
            'content', t.content
         )
       )
       from public.template t),
      '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    'nextGenerationPrompt', coalesce(
      (select pcl.user_text
       from public."projectChatLog" pcl
       where pcl.project_id = pi.project_id
       order by pcl.created_at desc
       limit 1),
      ''
    )
  )
  into result
  from public.project_information pi
  where pi.project_id = p_project_id;

  return coalesce(result, '{}'::jsonb);
end;$function$

arguments: p_user_id uuid, p_auth_key text, p_required_value integer
p_service_key text, p_runtime_value integer, p_source_ref text, p_user_id uuid
p_model_key text, p_used_tokens bigint, p_source_ref text, p_user_id uuid
p_auth_key text, p_required_value integer, p_user_id uuid
p_service text, p_group_id integer, p_pwd text, p_ext_user_name text
function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_group_cred(p_service text, p_group_id integer, p_pwd text, p_ext_user_name text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
begin
  if not exists (
    select 1
    from public.tableuser_group tg
    where tg.group_id = p_group_id
      and tg.user_id = auth.uid()
  ) then
    raise exception 'not assigned to group_id %', p_group_id;
  end if;

  insert into public.group_cred(group_id, service, ext_user_name_enc, pw_enc, created_at, updated_at)
  values (
    p_group_id,
    p_service,
    case when p_ext_user_name is null then null else public.amezit_cred_encrypt(p_ext_user_name) end,
    public.amezit_cred_encrypt(p_pwd),
    now(),
    now()
  )
  on conflict (group_id, service) do update
  set
    ext_user_name_enc = excluded.ext_user_name_enc,
    pw_enc = excluded.pw_enc,
    updated_at = now();
end;
$function$

arguments: p_pplan_id integer, p_service_key text, p_max_value integer, p_infinit boolean, p_period_key text
p_pplan_id integer, p_model_key text, p_max_tokens bigint, p_infinit boolean, p_period_key text
p_service text, p_pwd text, p_ext_user_name text
function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_user_cred(p_service text, p_pwd text, p_ext_user_name text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$begin
  insert into public.user_cred(user_id, service, ext_user_name_enc, pw_enc, created_at, updated_at)
  values (
    auth.uid(),
    p_service,
    case when p_ext_user_name is null then null else public.amezit_cred_encrypt(p_ext_user_name) end,
    public.amezit_cred_encrypt(p_pwd),
    now(),
    now()
  )
  on conflict (user_id, service) do update
  set
    ext_user_name_enc = excluded.ext_user_name_enc,
    pw_enc = excluded.pw_enc,
    updated_at = now();
end;$function$

arguments: p_owner_id uuid, p_project_id bigint, p_chat_action_type chat_action_types
p_project_id bigint, p_group_key text, p_param_name text, p_param_value text
